About Me

~/whoami

I'm KEERTHANA.S, a first-year BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications) student at RD International Arts & Science College. I'm passionate about technology and determined to make my mark in the tech world.

~/interests

Deeply drawn to programming and mathematics — the two most powerful languages humans have ever created. Logic is my superpower.

~/mindset

I believe in learning every single day. Technology is the greatest equalizer — and I intend to be at its frontier, not just a user of it.

~/fun_fact

This portfolio is my very first coding project, built with the power of Artificial Intelligence. The future starts now. 🚀

My vision goes far beyond a college degree. I want to build technology that disrupts industries, democratises access to knowledge, and pushes humanity forward.
